description_long: This is a modern, belt-fed machine gun with a robust, matte black metal construction and a prominent green ammunition box mounted on the left side. The weapon features a heavy cylindrical barrel with a ribbed handguard for heat dissipation and a sturdy integrated bipod for stability during sustained fire. The stock is a fixed, ergonomic design with a thick, contoured buttpad for shoulder support, and the pistol grip is textured for secure handling. The top of the receiver displays a visible belt of linked ammunition feeding into the chamber, and the upper rail appears to have mounting points for optics or accessories. Iron sights are present, with a rear aperture and a front post, providing basic aiming capability. The overall design is utilitarian, emphasizing durability and functionality for use in urban environments.
description: A modern, belt-fed machine gun with a matte black finish, green ammo box, integrated bipod, and fixed ergonomic stock. Features include ribbed barrel, visible belt feed, and iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the machine gun, green ammo box, ribbed barrel, and fixed stock.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel muzzle, bipod legs, and the width of the ammo box.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the exposed ammunition belt feeding into the receiver and the detailed handguard.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, pistol grip, and the alignment of the bipod and ammo box.
attribute_barrel_type: heavy cylindrical barrel with ribbed handguard
attribute_stock_design: fixed polymer stock with contoured buttpad
attribute_magazine_type: belt-fed with attached green ammunition box
attribute_iron_sight_configuration: rear aperture sight with fixed front post
